editAgentRounds.reply: I'll read the relevant files to find the duplicate symbol and decide the minimal fix (make the variable a single definition and extern elsewhere). I'll open `Core/Src/app_freertos.c`, `Core/Inc/aht20.h`, and `Core/Src/aht20.c`. Expected outcome: identify where `aht20` is defined twice and update files so it's defined once and declared extern where needed. I'll read those three files now.

I'll update `Core/Src/aht20.c` to rename the internal global pointer to `aht20_ptr` and fix the `AHT20_Init` function signature; then I'll update `Core/Src/app_freertos.c` to call `AHT20_Init()` without arguments. After edits I'll run the error checker.
I'll run the project's error checker to see if the multiple definition error is resolved or if further changes in other files are needed.

I'll update `app_freertos.c` to call `AHT20_Init()` without arguments, and update `aht20.h` and `aht20.c` to change `AHT20_ReleaseSemaphore` to return void (used only as callback helper). Then I'll run the error checker.
